7.5.42.en: New fingerprints added across bulb_dimmable, button_wireless_2, button_wireless_plug, fingerbot via case normalization.

7.5.41.en: v7.5.41 - 3,202 new fingerprints from ZHA, Z2M, Z-Link and ZCT. Battery endpoint scan fix, Fingerbot capability timing fix, and kinetic detection improvement for soil sensors.

7.5.40.en: Bug fix: Empty battery reports on sleepy devices resolved with adaptive battery listeners and ZCL/IAS fallbacks.

7.5.39.en: Updated 3202 fingerprints across 228 drivers. Added new device support and minor fixes.

7.5.38.en: No user-facing changes in this release.

7.5.37.en: Fix all runtime syntax errors, resolve unclosed braces, add support for wall_remote_2_gang assets and validate SDK3 compliance

7.5.35.en: v7.5.34: Fixed condition card registration in `air_quality_comprehensive` and `din_rail_meter` drivers (resolved runtime errors), Restored draft-to-test , Standardized button flow cards (button_pressed, button_double_press, button_long_press, button_multi_press, button_release, knob_rotated), Added OTA check updates action card, Added tuya_dp_send_typed and tuya_dp

7.5.34.en: v7.5.34: Fixed condition card registration in air_quality_comprehensive and din_rail_meter drivers. Standardized button flow cards. Synced upstream fixes from .

7.5.33.en: Fixed condition cards in air quality & DIN rail meter drivers. Added standardized button flow triggers (press, double press, long press, release, knob rotation). Synced upstream driver improvements and updated app assets.

7.5.32.en: v7.5.32: . Harmonized driver icons, updated app store assets, and restored draft-to-test  fixes.

7.5.31.en: v7.5.31: Harmonized 228 driver icons with new SVG assets. Updated app store images. Fixed various device icon inconsistencies. Added draft-to-test promotion  for faster testing.

7.5.30.en: Harmonized icons across all 228 drivers, updated app store assets, and added support for new soil sensor fingerprint (_TZE284_0ints6wl).

7.5.29.en: Bug fixes and improvements for Tuya Zigbee devices. Added support for new soil sensor fingerprint. Updated diagnostics and security.

7.5.28.en: Added 3,208 new fingerprints, improved driver matching for soil sensors, and fixed various device initialization issues.

7.5.27.en: v7.5.27: . New IR pairing wizard, improved power clamp meter, and various bug fixes.

7.5.26.en: Fixed SDK3 deprecation warnings across all 45 drivers by migrating from deprecated getTriggerCard to getDeviceTriggerCard. Improved stability and compatibility with latest Homey firmware.

7.5.25.en: v7.5.25: Fixed critical MODULE_NOT_FOUND crash on fingerbot, motion_sensor_2, and sirentemphumidsensor. Added PJ-1203A mapping. New fingerprints for power_clamp_meter.

7.5.24.en: v7.5.24: . Fix: gate opener DP3 contact sensor (issue #305). Migrated deprecated flow triggers to modern triggerFlowCard helper. Added missing fingerprints.

7.5.23.en: Maintenance release v7.5.23 — . Internal data cleanup and archive of obsolete planning files. No new drivers or fingerprints.

7.5.22.en: Version 7.5.22 — App metadata and store listing update. No new drivers or fingerprints added in this release.

7.5.43.en: v7.5.42: Fixed fingerprint matching for devices with mixed-case manufacturer/product IDs across bulb_dimmable, button_wireless_2, button_wireless_plug, and fingerbot drivers., Added case-normalized fingerprint variants from Johan Benz upstream sync, improving device pairing reliability., Expanded fingerprint database with normalized casings to handle firmware variability.
